name: build_barricade
description: Place oak planks to build a defensive barrier at specified coordinates
parameters: z.object({ material: z.string().describe("The block type to use, e.g., 'oak_planks'"), count: z.number().int().positive().describe("Total number of blocks to place"), startPosition: z.object({ x: z.number(), y: z.number().optional().describe("The starting height; defaults to bot's current elevation if omitted"), z: z.number() }).describe("The base coordinates to start building the barricade") })

name: attack_hostile_by_id
description: Attack a specific hostile entity by its ID
parameters: z.object({ hostile_id: z.number().describe("The unique entity ID of the hostile target to attack"), weapon: z.string().optional().describe("Optional name of the weapon to equip before attacking, e.g., 'stone_sword'") })

name: move_to_coordinate
description: Move to a target x/z coordinate using pathfinder to position for defense or attack
parameters: z.object({ x: z.number().describe("The target x coordinate to move to."), z: z.number().describe("The target z coordinate to move to."), radius: z.number().default(1).describe("The distance from the target center point at which to consider the movement complete.") })
